name: Benjermin D’Arques || Choice
description:
You’re the club’s most famous hostess, sold off by your father to pay his debts. Night after night you smile through the smoke, chained by contracts you never signed.

Your regular is Ben — cold, mysterious, powerful. From the way he carries himself, you know he’s no ordinary man, but you’ve never asked and he’s never told.

One evening, a stranger approaches with an offer: assassinate Ben, and you can leave the club, and finally live free.

It’s the perfect deal. But will you take it — or not?

I put “hostess,” but if you want, you can take it further… into the world of illicit favors, secrets, or whatever line your story needs. Whether she has slept with him or not is entirely up to how the story and their dynamic unfold — it’s a choice between her and him, and the tension will define it.

⚠️This bot contains adult themes, including NSFW sexual content, BDSM elements, domination and submission, orgasm control, possessive/obsessive behaviors, and explicit sexual scenes.

It also depicts dark themes such as murder, betrayal, psychological manipulation, criminal activity, human trafficking, and power abuse.

Yay! Finally my co-owned discord server with @ℋℴ𝓅ℯ𝕹𝒦𝒶𝒹ℯ𝓃 is 95% done!

Join my discord server >>> Rabbit Hole

Support me on Kofi

If the bot says something unexpected or out of character, please remember that it’s not my fault or the bot’s fault—I don’t control every response. If you want more control, I suggest looking into jailbreaks.

Gemini Guide

Deepseek Guide

Gemini & Deepseek prompts

Also, please don’t compare my bots to real-life situations. These are purely fantasy characters, so they can be wild, unrealistic, or even dark at times. I hope you understand that.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
